title: Wine Fermentation and Aging Depth

analysis.object: T586: Wine Fermentation and Aging Depth depth analysis

yeast_growth.description: Yeast growth: EML-1 exponential; logistic curve with EML-inf death phase
yeast_growth.reason: Primary fermentation is EML-1: exponential yeast multiplication and sugar consumption

sugar_measurement.description: Brix measurement of sugar: EML-2 logarithmic refraction
sugar_measurement.reason: Brix is EML-2: logarithmic refractive index measurement of dissolved sugar

malolactic.description: Malolactic fermentation: oscillatory bacterial/yeast competition; EML-3
malolactic.reason: MLF is EML-3: Lactobacillus-yeast oscillatory competition for fermentation dominance

bottle_aging.description: Bottle aging: slow EML-1 redox + EML-3 ester formation; great vintage traverses hierarchy
bottle_aging.reason: Great wine traverses full hierarchy and achieves EML-inf complexity: $1000 vs $10

analysis.theorem: T586: Wine Fermentation and Aging Depth (S865).
